trades.reasoning: Top score 95 with RSI 67.7 in the sweet spot, MACD fully bullish, and airlines are direct beneficiaries of risk-on sentiment — travel demand remains robust heading into summer.
Score 90 with RSI 64.2 and MACD bullish, adds clean energy exposure to a tech-heavy portfolio while momentum confirms the breakout above SMA-20.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.3% and S&P 500 up 0.9%, creating a favorable backdrop for momentum names. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash, I'm deploying into DAL (top-ranked at 95) and ENPH (clean energy diversification at 90) to put idle capital to work. Existing positions in QQQ, AMZN, and the rest remain intact as the broad rally supports all of them.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on May 20 with the NASDAQ leading at +1.3% as risk appetite returned to markets. Technology and growth stocks outperformed as investors rotated back into higher-beta names following recent consolidation. Cyclical sectors including travel, consumer discretionary, and energy also participated in the move, reflecting renewed confidence in the economic outlook.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月20日全面反彈，納斯達克指數領漲1.3%，市場風險偏好明顯回升。隨著投資者重新佈局高Beta成長股，科技及成長類股跑贏大市。航空、非必需消費品及能源等周期性板塊亦同步上揚，顯示市場對經濟前景的信心有所恢復。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on is when investors feel confident and shift money into higher-risk, higher-reward assets like growth stocks, airlines, and small caps — and away from safe havens like bonds or gold. On risk-on days, momentum stocks and cyclicals tend to outperform. Today's NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P +0.9% is a classic risk-on signal, which is why the top screener candidates are all showing bullish momentum.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好上升」（Risk-On）是指當投資者信心增強時，資金從債券、黃金等避險資產流向成長股、航空股、小型股等高風險高回報資產的市場狀態。在這類行情下，動能股與周期性板塊往往跑贏大市。今日納斯達克漲1.3%、標普漲0.9%，正是典型的Risk-On訊號，也是為何篩選出的候選股普遍呈現強勁上升動能的原因。
